summary: Closed Jeff corpus Phase 5 promotion staging after verifying approval-only skill drafts, candidate L-rules, no-promotion reasons, and the sniff-lens outcome rework.

evidence.command: for f in .flywheel/jeff-corpus/v1/promotions/skills/*/SKILL.md; do grep verdict and citation counts; done
evidence.result: all 5 staged skill drafts have one phase4_verdict field and at least three repo/file/line citations

evidence.command: awk candidate L-rule citation/verdict count over .flywheel/jeff-corpus/v1/promotions/l-rules/candidate-l-rules.md
evidence.result: all 5 candidate L-rules have Phase 4 verdict and exactly three evidence citations

did: Verified .flywheel/jeff-corpus/v1/learnings/05-skill-promotions.md exists and maps the staged promotions.
Verified five approval-only staged skill drafts under .flywheel/jeff-corpus/v1/promotions/skills/.
Verified five candidate L-rule sections under .flywheel/jeff-corpus/v1/promotions/l-rules/candidate-l-rules.md.
Verified five no-promotion reasons for DIVERGE/AVOID patterns.
Verified the sniff-lens rework report frames the result as promotion-ready drafts, saved plan-time, and closed false-positive paths.
didnt: Did not install any staged skill into ~/.claude/skills/.
Did not number or promote any candidate L-rule into AGENTS.md.
Did not bypass the Joshua approval or JSM workflow named by the staging artifact.
